metadata.file_name: Daryl Hall & John Oates - Say It Isn't So (Special Extended Dance Mix).flac
metadata.title: Say It Isn't So (Special Extended Dance Mix)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:43.24] Say it
[00:47.40] Say it ain't so
[00:51.68] Say it
[00:55.74] Say it ain't so
[01:00.39] Say it isn't so painful to tell me that you're dissatisfied
[01:08.53] Last time I asked you, I really got a lame excuse, I know that you lied
[01:16.99] Now wicked things can happen, you see 'em goin' down in war
[01:25.51] But when you play in a quiet way, that bites it even more
[01:33.76] (Say it) tell me what you want, yeah, I'll do it, baby, I promise right now
[01:42.15] (Say it) who propped you up when you were stopped, low motivation
[01:47.06] Had you on the ground
[01:50.82] I know your first reaction, you slide away, hide away, goodbye
[01:59.25] But if there's a doubt, maybe I can give out a thousand reasons why
[02:05.73] You have to say it isn't so (it isn't so)
[02:10.52] Now, say it isn't so (it isn't so)
[02:14.54] Now, say it isn't so (it isn't so)
[02:18.80] Oh, say it isn't so, oh, no (it isn't so)
[02:23.80] 
[02:58.90] It isn't so
[03:03.21] It isn't so
[03:07.42] It isn't so
[03:11.73] It isn't so
[03:15.09] (Say it) we like to be the strangers at the party, two rebels in a shell
[03:23.58] (Say it) you like to move with the best of them, you know, we move so well
[03:32.07] Don't need someone to lean on, I know where there's an open door
[03:40.75] But if I'm faced with being replaced, I want you even more
[03:47.00] So baby say it isn't so (it isn't so)
[03:51.53] Oh, say it isn't so, oh, no, no (it isn't so)
[03:55.94] I say it isn't so (it isn't so)
[03:59.96] Whoa, say it isn't so, oh, no (it isn't so), yeah
[04:06.99] 
[04:58.49] Say it
[05:02.98] Say it isn't so
[05:07.20] Why you wanna go? Do you have to say?
[05:11.59] Do you wanna go? Ooh, ooh, baby, say it isn't (say it isn't)
[05:16.27] Say, say, say it isn't (say it isn't)
[05:18.85] So (so, say it isn't)
[05:21.89] Why do you have to say it isn't (say it isn't)
[05:24.60] So? (Say it isn't) so
[05:28.53] (So, say it isn't)
[05:30.10] I know it's so hard for you (say it isn't)
[05:33.76] So hard (say it isn't)
[05:35.89] Don't say it, babe (so, say it isn't)
[05:38.77] There must be some other way (say it isn't)
[05:42.19] Don't have to (say it isn't)
[05:44.34] Some other way (so, say it isn't)
[05:46.80] Ah! You don't have to say (say it isn't)
[05:51.11] Eh (say it isn't)
[05:53.29] Don't have to say (so, say it isn't)
[05:55.91] You know I wanna make you (say it isn't)
[06:00.13] (Say it isn't) so (so, say it isn't)
[06:03.60] Ooh, you wanna say it isn't (say it isn't)
[06:07.23] Why do you have to? (Say it isn't)
[06:09.65] Oh (so, say it isn't)
[06:12.80] You don't have to say (say it isn't)
[06:15.73] Eh (say it isn't), eh (so, say it isn't)
[06:22.02] You don't have to say (say it isn't)
[06:24.45] Eh (say it isn't), eh (so, say it isn't)
[06:29.63] Oh, baby, say it isn't (say it isn't)
[06:32.67] So (say it isn't)
[06:35.01] So (so, say it isn't)
[06:37.99] Ah, baby, you don't have to (say it isn't)
